name: Check Cashing
description_short: ACE Cash Express operates 10+ locations across the Phoenix metro area offering check cashing, title loans, bill payment, money transfers, and prepaid card services.
description_long: ACE Cash Express is an established financial services provider with multiple storefront locations throughout the Phoenix, Arizona metropolitan area, including Glendale, Tempe, Mesa, Peoria, and Chandler. The company positions itself as a convenient alternative to traditional banking for unbanked and underbanked consumers seeking quick access to cash and money services. ACE's primary offerings include check cashing, title loans (both standard and title registration installment variants ranging from $100-$2,500), money transfers, money orders, bill payment services, ATM access, and tax preparation services. The company also offers branded financial products including the Porte prepaid account, Flare Account for online banking, and the ACE Elite Visa prepaid debit card, with banking services provided through Pathward, N.A., a federally insured institution. What distinguishes ACE is its extensive physical store network with consistent operating hours (typically 9 AM-8 PM), immediate in-store service availability, and bundled offerings that combine short-term lending with basic financial services. The company specifically markets to consumers who may lack traditional banking relationships or need rapid access to funds. However, consumers should note that title loans and similar products typically carry high interest rates and fees characteristic of the short-term lending industry. The check cashing and money services business model depends on transaction-based fee structures that can become costly for frequent users, and the emphasis on collateral-based lending products reflects a business model targeting credit-constrained populations.
pros: Multiple convenient locations (10 stores shown near Phoenix) with extended operating hours up to 8 PM
Same-day access to funds through in-store title loans ($100-$2,500 range)
Diverse service menu including check cashing, money orders, bill payment, and money transfers in one location
FDIC-insured prepaid account options (Porte and Flare Account) through Pathward partnership
No requirement for traditional bank account to access check cashing and money services
Title registration installment loans offer extended repayment periods compared to standard title loans
In-store tax services available during tax season
cons: Title loans and short-term lending products typically carry high interest rates and fees not disclosed on location page
Check cashing and money transfer services charge per-transaction fees that accumulate for regular users
Limited information provided about specific fee structures and terms on the storefront locator page
Reliance on collateral-based lending (vehicle title/registration) creates barriers for consumers without qualifying assets
Primary customer base consists of credit-constrained individuals, suggesting this is not suitable for traditional banking customers
best_for: Unbanked or underbanked consumers needing immediate check cashing without a bank account
Workers paid by check seeking same-day cash access without check deposit delays
Vehicle owners needing emergency short-term loans and willing to pledge collateral
Consumers needing one-stop access to money services (transfers, bill payment, money orders) in their neighborhood
diagnosis: ACE Cash Express is best for unbanked or underbanked consumers in the Phoenix area who need immediate check cashing, money transfer, or emergency short-term loans through physical storefronts. Primary caveat: title loans and short-term lending products carry high costs typical of collateral-based lending, and check cashing/money services rely on per-transaction fees that can become expensive for regular users.
services: Porte prepaid account with mobile banking
ACE Elite Visa prepaid debit card
